street.description: Street (or street segment) belonging to the parking district

district.description: Name of the parking district (constant per file)

from_point.description: Start of the segment range when the source gives a parenthetical 'X to Y'

segment_note.description: Non-range parenthetical qualifier (locality disambiguator like 'Newton Corner', or 'including <addresses>')

notes.description: Extractor remarks about source anomalies; never carries data
